productName: Seattle Bubble Works- Hash Pre-Rolls - Super Lemon Haze (S) - 3.75g
description: A sativa infused joint built on Super Lemon Haze and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, with a bright, heady lift. A little goes a long way.
